name: Can of Veggie Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 1/2 oz.) tiny whole Blue Lake stringless green beans
1 can (15 oz.) Belgian baby carrots, extra tiny
6 Green onions, diced (white and green parts)
Freshly ground coarse pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Dump the canned vegetables into a colander and drain well.
2. Make the dressing by combining all ingredients except the reserved half can in a bowl. Taste and adjust seasoning as desired.
3. Add the remaining half of the dressing to the drained vegetables and toss until well combined.
4. Chill the salad for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Serve on Bibb lettuce, garnished with a sprig of parsley and some whole wheat croutons.
6. Serve any reserved dressing alongside in a small bowl or cruet.
